chin_hakha.where_do_fractions_come_from: Ṭhen cu khoin dah a rat?
chin_hakha.the_earliest_fraction_notation_dates_t: Ṭhen ṭialnak a hmasa bik cu Egypt hlanlio kum 1800 BCE hrawng ah a rat. Egypt mi nih "unit fraction" lawng an hman — a cunglei nambat 1 a ngeimi lawng (1/2, 1/3, 1/4 bantuk). Ṭhen dang paoh cu unit fraction telhnak in an ṭial: 2/5 = 1/3 + 1/15. Tuchan bar ṭialnak (a cunglei nambat, a tanglei a cunglei nambat ah) cu kum 1200 CE hrawng ah Arab mathematician sinin a rat.
chin_hakha.where_do_the_fraction_words_come_from: Ṭhen biafang cu khoin dah a rat?
chin_hakha.numerator_comes_from_the_latin_numerar: "Numerator" cu Latin "numerare" (rel) in a rat — ṭhen zeizat timi a rel. "Denominator" cu "denominare" (min sak) in a rat — ṭhen a nganzia a min sak. Aa tlangin: a tanglei nambat nih ṭhen phun a min sak; a cunglei nambat nih cu ṭhen zeizat na ngeih timi a rel.
chin_hakha.decimals_as_we_know_them_were_populari: Tuchan decimal cu Simon Stevin nih kum 1585 ah a cauk "De Thiende" (The Tenth) ah a langhter. A hlanah cu nambat-a-dih-lo langhter awkah ṭhen lawng a um. Decimal point cu kum 1700 hna ah lawng vawlei pumpi in an cohlan.
chin_hakha.what_does_percent_mean: Percent sullam cu zeidah a si?
chin_hakha.percent_comes_from_the_latin_per_centu: "Percent" cu Latin "per centum" — "za khat ah" in a rat. Cucaah 25% cu 25 per 100, asiloah 25/100 timi a si. % hmelchunhnak cu kum 15 (15th-century) Italy dawr ṭialnak i "per c." tawinak in a chuak.
chin_hakha.the_reciprocal_of_a_b_is_b_a_flip_it_u: a/b i reciprocal cu b/a a si — a bung tein letting. Ṭhen zero a si lomi paoh nih reciprocal a ngei. Ṭhen le a reciprocal pungnak cu zungzal 1 a si: (3/4) × (4/3) = 12/12 = 1. Cucaah ṭhen he kulhnak cu a reciprocal he pungnak he aa lo lo.
chin_hakha.why_is_1_2_the_most_used_fraction: Zeicaah 1/2 cu ṭhen hmanmi a tam bik a si?
chin_hakha.1_2_is_the_most_common_fraction_in_eve: 1/2 cu nifate biafang ah ṭhen a tammi bik a si, zeicahtiah 0 le 1 karlak a lai taktak ah a um. Biafang in kan chimmi ṭhen lawng zong a si: "cheh" — "pahnih chungah pakhat" ti loin. Holh dang zong nih 1/3 le 1/4 caah biafang ṭhen an ngei (thumdanh, palidanh).
chin_hakha.a_pizza_is_a_perfect_fraction_model_be: Pizza cu ṭhen model tlingtlang a si, zeicahtiah kual a si (cucaah peng paoh cu a lai in a chuak), peng cu rel a fawi, cun mathematical sullam taktak he aa tlak: ṭhen n/d cu aa lawnmi ṭhen a dihmi d chungin aa lawnmi ṭhen n a si.
chin_hakha.when_fractions_are_not_enough: Ṭhen nih a tlin lo tikah
chin_hakha.some_numbers_like_and_2_cannot_be_writ: Nambat cheukhat, π le √2 bantuk cu nambat a kimmi pahnih i ṭhen ah ṭial khawh a si lo. Cu hna cu irrational number an ti. Pythagorean hna (kum 500 BCE hrawng) nih √2 cu ṭhen ah ṭial khawh a si lo timi a langhtermi Hippasus mathematician kha an thah tiah an chim.
chin_hakha.any_real_number_can_be_written_as_a_co: Real number zeihmanh cu "continued fraction" ah ṭial khawh a si — 1 + 1/(2 + 1/(2 + 1/(2 + ...))) bantuk aa hrungmi ṭhen. Hi nih ṭhen tahdawhnak a ṭha bik a pek. π ≈ 22/7 cu a hmasa bik term hna in; a ṭha deuh cu 355/113.
chin_hakha.musical_pitch_ratios_are_fractions_the: Music aw ratio cu ṭhen a si. Octave cu 2:1 ratio a si (frequency a i pahnih). Perfect fifth cu 3:2. Major third cu 5:4. Pythagoras nih nambat a kimmi ratio a fawimi nih aw a ṭhami a chuahter timi a hmuh.
chin_hakha.two_pizzas_can_only_be_combined_if_the: Pizza pahnih cu peng a nganzia aa lawnmi ah at asile lawng aa kawh khawh. A tanglei nambat aa lo lomi = peng a nganzia aa lo lomi = aa kawh khawh lo. A tanglei nambat pumhmun cu "peng aa lawnmi" timi taktak a si.
chin_hakha.baseball_stats_are_fractions: Baseball stat cu ṭhen a si
chin_hakha.a_batting_average_like_333_means_1_3_o: Batting average .333 bantuk cu at-bat 1/3 nih hit a chuahter timi a si. Pitcher ERA, on-base percentage, slugging percentage — vialte cu ṭhen an si. Baseball cu hi bantuk statistical ruahnak a langhter hmasa bikmi thawhlehnak a si, kum 1850 hna ah a thawk.
chin_hakha.georges_cuisenaire_was_a_belgian_prima: Georges Cuisenaire cu kum 1950 hna i Belgium primary saya a si, ṭhen tel in nambat pehtlaihnak ngakchia hna theihhngilhter awkah a saumi 1 in 10 rod a rakmi a chuahtu a si. Classroom tampi ah na hmuhmi "fraction wall" cu amah rod taktak i digital thlah a si.
chin_hakha.the_chinese_mathematical_text_nine_cha: China math cauk "Nine Chapters on the Mathematical Art" (kum 100 BCE hrawng) nih ṭhen arithmetic a tel, tuchan kan cawnmi he mathematical thawng aa lawnmi a tanglei nambat pumhmun hmuhnak lam zong a tel.
chin_hakha.computers_store_decimal_fractions_in_b: Computer nih decimal ṭhen kha binary ah a chiah. Decimal 0.1 cu binary ah hmaan tein langhter khawh a si lo — base 2 ah aa cangṭhanmi ṭhen ah a cang. Cucaah 0.1 + 0.2 cu programming language cheukhat ah 0.30000000000000004 tiin a chuak.

chin_hakha.let_your_number_be_n_the_sequence_n_1_: Na nambat cu n si seh. Zulhzat: (n+1) × 2 + 4 − 6 = 2n + 2 + 4 − 6 = 2n. 2 in kulh → n. A hrampi lak → 0. Hei — cu nih 0 a pek, 1 a si lo. Ceih: n → (n+1)×2 = 2n+2 → +4 = 2n+6 → −6 = 2n → ÷2 = n → −hrampi = 0. "Trick" cu zulhzat ah a thuhmi constant cungah a hngat.
chin_hakha.each_term_is_half_the_previous_the_tot: Term pakhat cio cu a hmasami cheh a si. A dihnak cu 1 a phan hnah nain a phak taktak bal lo. Hi cu term hmasa bik 1/2 le ratio 1/2 he a dongh lomi geometric series a si: S = (1/2) / (1 − 1/2) = 1. Cucaah Zeno lennak paradox cu math in chimh khawh a si.
chin_hakha.even_though_each_term_is_small_the_ser: Term pakhat cio cu a tete nain series cu a i thleng. 100 a luah awkah term 1.5 × 10^43 hrawng na herh. Hi cu Nicole Oresme nih kum 1300 hna ah grouping in a langhter: 1/3 + 1/4 > 1/4 + 1/4 = 1/2; 1/5+...+1/8 > 4 × 1/8 = 1/2; telh awk 1/2 dang na hmuh zungzal khawh.
chin_hakha.check_1_4_and_1_3_4_1_1_3_1_check_2_5_: 1/4 le 1/3 check: (4)(1) − (1)(3) = 1. 2/5 le 1/2 check: (5)(1) − (2)(2) = 1. Hi thil nih rational number vialte i Stern-Brocot tree a chuahter.
